item.title: OPEC+ Holds Output Steady Through Q3
item.description: The cartel held production unchanged at 39.7 mb/d after a brief virtual meeting.

item.title: Permian Production Tops 6.4 mb/d in March
item.description: EIA Drilling Productivity Report shows continued growth led by Delaware sub-basin.

item.title: Old Stale Headline From Last Year
item.description: This should be filtered out by the lookback window.

item.title: Headline With No Date
item.description: No pubDate set; should still be kept.
